name: GPT-5.6 Model Router
long_description: GPT-5.6 Model Router is an explicit autonomy-first Codex plugin. The root decides whether delegation is worthwhile and may override every Luna, Terra, Sol, effort, fork, review, or fallback default. Optional schema-v3 tools provide advisory recommendations and compact handoffs without blocking execution. Ten schema-4 roles are leaves by default, while an exact one-level grant permits bounded depth-2 leaf descendants. Unified transactional setup safely enables effective depth 2, migrates byte-identical older templates, and preserves unrelated configuration. The plugin has no MCP server, hosted backend, connector, analytics, credentials, or implicit invocation.
starter_prompts: $setup-gpt56-model-router Install or upgrade the schema-4 router and depth capability.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this bounded repository change with autonomous cost-aware routing.
$route-gpt56-task Decide whether these independent workstreams benefit from parallel delegation.
$route-gpt56-task Implement this critical authorization fix with advisory independent review.
availability: All countries and regions where OpenAI permits plugin distribution
